item.title: Toyota Motor Engineering & Manufacturing: POWER TRAIN:AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION Recall (2024 toyota tundra)
item.summary: Toyota Motor Engineering & Manufacturing (Toyota) is recalling certain 2022-2024 Tundra, Tundra Hybrid, Lexus LX600, and 2023-2024 Sequoia Hybrid vehicles. Unexpected vehicle movement may occur when the vehicle is in neutral and the brakes are not applied.
item.affectedPeople: Unexpected vehicle movement can increase the risk of a crash.
item.remedy: Dealers will update the transmission control ECU software, free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed April 8, 2024. Owners may contact Toyota customer service at 1-800-331-4331. Toyota's numbers for this recall are 24TA02 and 24LA02.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
